goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 09:15'.
The train should depart from 'birmingham new street' and should leave on 'thursday'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'theatre'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 09:15
The train should depart from birmingham new street and should leave on thursday
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of theatre
Make sure you get address and entrance fee
